allow: Bash(python -c "import stripe; print\('stripe version:', stripe.VERSION\); print\('has stripe.error.StripeError:', hasattr\(stripe, 'error'\) and hasattr\(stripe.error, 'StripeError'\)\); print\('has stripe.StripeError:', hasattr\(stripe, 'StripeError'\)\)")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $url = 'https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/releases/download/v1.2024.7/plantuml-1.2024.7.jar'; $out = "$env:TEMP\\plantuml.jar"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $out\)\) { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing }; Get-Item $out | Select-Object FullName, Length)
